steps.title: Identify the used fabric
steps.content: Naomi uses $4$ yards for each costume, so if she makes $x$ costumes, the fabric used for costumes is $4x$ yards. The variable $y$ is the total fabric purchased.

steps.title: Interpret the difference
steps.content:
The equation is
$$y-4x=7$$
This says the purchased fabric minus the used fabric is $7$ yards. So Naomi purchased $7$ yards more fabric than she used to make the costumes. The answer is D.
